commentaries.author: George Leo Haydock
commentaries.content: 1 Esdras Wisdom of Solomon Wisdom of Sirach Epistle of Jeremiah Prayer of Manasseh And it shall be the prince's part to give burnt offerings, and grain offerings, and drink offerings, in the feasts, and in the new moons, and in the sabbaths, in all appointed feasts of the house of Israel: he shall prepare the sin offering, and the grain offering, and the burnt offering, and the peace offerings, to make reconciliation for the house of Israel. This was given before perhaps gratis, 2 Paralipomenon xxxi. Solomon and Ezechias showed great magnificence. After the captivity the people laid on the third of a sicle per head, as this order was not observed, 2 Esdras x.
